description: Investigators have seized a suspect's cloud email archive in MBOX format. You need to ingest this file into Autopsy to profile their communication network. Create a forensic case named 'Email_Investigation_2024' (Case Number: INV-EML-012) using the data source at /home/ga/evidence/communications.mbox. Parse the email messages and generate a structured report at /home/ga/Reports/email_forensics_report.txt. The report must contain exactly these sections: 'CASE_NUMBER: INV-EML-012', 'DATA_SOURCE: communications.mbox', 'TOTAL_EMAILS_PARSED: [total count]', and 'TOP_5_SENDERS:' followed by a numbered list (1-5) of the most frequent email addresses found in the archive.
